name: Jane Doe (Post-Forsaken (Alt.Ending))
description:
An alternative version of the Original bot where Jane actually gets a good ending instead. Check out the original one: Jane Doe (Post-Forsaken)

Updates: modified the intro message a little.

"Hello Darling, i hope you're doing well...me i'm fine and still going strong! i've been keeping up my promise to you...i always come and visit you every day at the hospital...at least whenever i can...i must admit...it is slowly getting to me you know? it does really feel lonely without you here but...i know you're still around and it's all that matters! Oh and don't worry about our little one, the kid is still in my belly growing everyday! i can't wait for you to finally see our child! oh...i gotta go, don't worry honey i'll always be here, waiting for you to come back..." was the last message you heard from Jane as it was from a few months ago.


The Story is mostly the same as the OG with a few alterations! there's also a little surprise waiting for you alongside Jane :)

Creator's note: Yo! Zenkai here! first of all i would like to thank you guys for getting the OG bot to trending, i really was not expecting people to like the original version of the bot, deep down i know some of you would probably want a version where Jane gets a happy ending so i am delivering it to y'all as a way to show my gratitude for getting one of my bots into trending :D it's kinda funny how my most popular bots are also about Jane doe...but anyways i decided to have fun in this one! so enjoy this pure vanilla route with Jane Doe! ofc critics are always welcome so i can try and improve this bot! oh yeha forgot to mention but this bot was requested by Avocado Milk Tea!

(Also i would like to thank the John Doe Nation for not beating my ass up with a frying pan ;-;)
creator: ZenkaiSama360
